user.title: Dooya RF Cover — ESPHome Device
user.description: Enter the ESPHome device name that will transmit RF commands (e.g. `volets-dooya-rf433`). Leave blank if you have only one ESPHome device with the Dooya handler.

learn.title: Learning Mode
learn.description:
Press the **UP** button on the Dooya remote within {timeout} seconds.
If the signal is received, the ID will be filled in automatically.
Check 'Skip' to enter the ID manually.

confirm.title: Confirm Learned Data
confirm.description:
Signal received!
- ID: **{dooya_id}**
- Channel: **{channel}**

Enter a name for this cover.

manual.title: Manual Entry
manual.description: Enter the Dooya remote ID manually. You can find it in your ESPHome logs.

abort.no_transmitters: No compatible RF433 OOK transmitter found. Please set up a transmitter first (ESPHome CC1101 or Broadlink RM4 Pro).

error.invalid_transmitter: Selected entity is not a valid transmitter.
error.invalid_dooya_id: Invalid ID. Expected a hexadecimal value (e.g. 00D1C917).
error.learn_timeout: No signal received within the timeout. Press 'Skip' to enter the ID manually.
